content.rendered:
Get ready, Udaipur — this Holi, we’re turning the lake into a celebration with DJ Anny, DJ Sijoe and Headliner DJ ND 🌈🌊

PRONITE presents Rangilo Rajasthan – Udaipur’s First Lakeside Holi, an electrifying day-long festival set at the stunning The Udaisarovar, overlooking the serene Udaisagar Lake. On 3rd March | 10 AM – 5 PM, experience Holi like never before — where colours, music, water, and panoramic lake views come together for one unforgettable vibe.

Step into a high-energy world of:

💦 Foam Fiesta – Dance through clouds of foam under the open sky.
🫧 Bubble-Themed Fun Zones – A playful, picture-perfect celebration space.
🌿 Organic Colours Only – Celebrate safely, splash freely.
🎧 DJ Bolly Party – Non-stop BollyTech, commercial & retro beats to keep you moving.
🏊 Lake-View Infinity Pool – Party with a breathtaking panoramic backdrop.
👶 Kids Pool Area – A safe and splashy zone just for the little ones.
🍴 Curated Food Stalls – Indulge in festive flavours all day long.
🍹 Mocktails & Cocktails – Sip, chill, and soak in the lakeside energy.

Imagine dancing to your favourite beats, colours in the air, foam at your feet, and the sun reflecting off the lake — this isn’t just a Holi party, it’s a lakeside festival experience.

📍 The Udaisarovar, Lakadwas, Near Udaisagar Lake, Udaipur (Raj.)

EARLY BIRD SALE ENDS ON 27TH FEBRUARY 2026! SO HURRY!!
Cover valid only for Early Bird Tickets

As the night unfolds by the lakeside, lose yourself in hypnotic beats, open skies, and the signature OFFGRID vibe that keeps the dancefloor alive till late.

What to expect

🎶 Curated House & Techno sets by Naayaab & Shaiflai
🔊 High-fidelity sound & immersive production
🌊 Stunning lakeside venue with mountain backdrop
🔥 Intimate, high-energy dancefloor experience
🍸 Food & beverage counters available at the venue
🌌 A night designed for true underground music lovers

Limited early bird entries live now.

Step away from the grid. Step into the music.

OFFGRID.

A New Year. A New Energy.
A NEW START.

content.rendered:
White Night Christmas Club Extravaganza in Udaipur

 

Step into a winter wonderland of glamour and beats as we transform Udaipur into a snowy paradise for a dazzling White Night Christmas Club Extravaganza. Join us for a night of festive revelry, chic elegance, and electrifying music that will set the city aglow.

 

Event Highlights:

 

 

Dress in White Elegance: Embrace the spirit of the season by dressing in your chicest all-white attire. Let the dance floor sparkle with the collective glamour of a sea of white outfits.

 

Sonic Snowstorm: Immerse yourself in the beats of our top-notch DJs, delivering a fusion of holiday classics and pulsating club anthems. Dance the night away surrounded by a sonic snowstorm of music.

 

Winter Cocktail Wonderland: Indulge in a selection of winter-themed cocktails and beverages at our fully stocked bars. Sip on frosty concoctions that complement the festive atmosphere.

 

Secret Santa Surprises: Keep an eye out for our roaming Secret Santa’s who will be spreading joy and surprises throughout the night. Who knows what festive treats they might have in store for you?

 

 

Event Details:

 

Date:24 December 2023

 

Time: 7 pm onwards

 

Venue: The Artist House

Dress Code ; White

Tickets: Visit www.Pronit.in

Christmas Cheers in Udaipur!

Celebrate the holiday season with a touch of glamour at our White Night Christmas Club Extravaganza. Whether you’re looking for a festive night out with friends or an opportunity to dance the night away, join us for an unforgettable celebration under a canopy of snowy lights.

Follow us on social media for updates and sneak peeks:

 

 

#WhiteNightChristmas #ClubExtravaganza #UdaipurNightlife

content.rendered:
🎄Udaipur Christmas Festival🎟:UCF’23

 

A 3-Day Extravaganza UCF’23

 

Celebrate the spirit of Christmas in the enchanting city of Udaipur with a three-day festival that promises magical moments, pulsating beats, and unforgettable memories. Join us as we bring together the best of entertainment, music, and festive cheer across three iconic venues.

 

Day 1: VH1 Supersonic Xmas Spectacle at @bigshotclubudaipur

 

Embark on a musical journey with the exhilarating vibes of @vh1supersonic on our grand opening night. Dance under the stars to the beats of world-class DJs @candiceredding and experience the fusion of Christmas magic with electrifying tunes. Immerse yourself in the festival spirit as we kick off three days of joy and celebration.

 

Highlights:

 

a Main Stage Madness: Featuring top-tier artists and DJs from the VH1 Supersonic lineup.

Witness a festive transformation of [BIGSHOT] with Performing LED Artist’s 🎭 , and holiday-inspired Concert .

 

 

Day 2:The Artist House @theartisthouseindia Udaipur –

CHRISTMAS EVE (DRESSCODE: WHITE)

Experience the charm of an intimate gathering at the renowned Artist House in Udaipur. Nestled in the heart of the city, this exclusive venue offers a more personal and close-knit setting for an unforgettable night of music, art, and holiday festivities.

Christmas-Themed Decor

 

Highlights:

 

VIP CLUBBING NITE: Enjoy DJ @tanishqaudio performances from emerging and local Bolly Tunes.

 

: Explore the creative side of Udaipur with UCF’23 🎄🎅

 

 

& Day 3: Lake side Camping – Grand Finale under the Stars✨️

 

Conclude the Udaipur Christmas Festival in style at the breathtaking The Jannat Camps,Udaisagar (by Lakeside opp.@rafflesudaipur )

 

The venue will provide the perfect backdrop for a grand finale under the stars. Revel in the festive spirit with a night filled with LIVE music and the joy of Christmas.

 

Highlights:

Open-AirCamping🏕: Camp under the natural beauty of The Jannat Lakeside Cottages.

Bonfire 🔥 📛 Bliss: Gather around the warmth of bonfires and indulge in the ambiance.

 

Grand Fireworks : Conclude the festival with a spectacular fireworks show, lighting up the Udaipur sky in festive colors.

 

www.Pronite.in

 

STAY INFORMED!
